narrative:
58 Ohio House district has 75,794 registered voters, with 57.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 8.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 33.5%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 24.8 percentage points. Registration is trending redder in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean +5.8% D−R vs +34.4% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
